name: Royal Ryan Reber
bio: American bantamweight out of Florida who joined BKFC in 2022. Known as an efficient, calculated, technical fighter, holding a 7-2 BKFC record. Notable moments include a chaotic BKFC 32 incident when opponent Jack Grady was disqualified for repeated illegal headbutts, and a five-round war with Travis Thompson that ended in a draw before Reber won the sixth-round tiebreaker via split decision.
